description: CompositionGrey boxer brief made of 95% cotton and 5% lycra, has a wide comfortable elasticated waistband with a printed brand tab, stitch detailing, print on the side and printed label on the inside of the waistbandProcured from authorized channel partner of Sri SR Mill, Tanuku (AP) & ndash the India licensee for Playboy Men& rsquo s UnderwearWash careMachine wash cold at 40 degrees with like coloursUse only non chlorine bleach when neededTumble dry lowCool ironOnce you experience the superior comfort and cheeky style of playboy inner wear, there's no going back. Crafted from soft cotton/lycra blend with soft elastic, perfect for your comfort, Playboy has kept your convenience in mind while designing this pair of briefs.
